app.title: Demo meeting form
app.description: This is the internal frontend of your BitSwan Internal App. It is protected by OAuth2 — only employees authorized through the BitSwan Automation Operation Center can access it. Use this dashboard to build secure internal tools for your company.
userInfo.title: User Info
tokenInfo.title: Token Info
counter.title: Your Count
counter.description: Click the button to increment your personal counter (stored in PostgreSQL).
gallery.title: Image Gallery
gallery.description: Upload images to the shared gallery (stored in MinIO). These images are also visible on the external frontend.
schedule.title: Demo schedule
form.title: Demo meeting form
form.noMeeting: No Demo meeting yet. The next one will appear on the configured demo day.
form.loadError: Couldn't load the meeting from the server: {{error}}. Check the browser console for details.
form.noProjects: No projects added for this meeting yet.
form.projectFieldsRequired: Both project name and leader are required.
form.noSubscriptions: You haven't subscribed to any projects yet. Search below to find one, or create a new project — writing a note for it will subscribe you automatically.
form.leaderPlaceholder: Pick a person or type a new name
leaderPicker.empty: Nobody in the catalog yet — type a name to add one.
roster.title: Attendance
colleaguesNotes.title: Colleagues' notes
colleaguesNotes.empty: No colleague has submitted notes yet.
peopleAdmin.title: People
peopleAdmin.description: Rename colleagues — useful when a display name still shows up as an email address. Edits save per row.
history.title: Past Demos
adminTools.title: Admin tools
adminTools.description: For manual testing — creates a Demo meeting for today, deleting any existing one for the same date (along with its projects and entries).
adminTools.recreateConfirm: Recreate today's Demo? Any existing meeting on this date will be deleted, including its projects and per-user entries.
